tasks.task: Move auntu download file out of downloads folder
tasks.description: Drag the auntu downloaded file to a different location within your system for organization and ease.

tasks.task: Install auntu virtual machine on VMware player
tasks.description: Open VMware Player, create a new virtual machine using auntu's ISO, name it Bucky, set the username and password, allocate 20GB of hard drive space and increase RAM to 4GB.

tasks.task: Shrink video for better viewing clarity
tasks.description: Adjust the video size to make the screen clearer by hiding unnecessary parts of the desktop or adjusting the text size.
Open system settings, adjust appearance preferences like button sizes for better readability and explore other options within system settings to get familiar with the interface.

tasks.task: Uninstall unnecessary auntu programs and configure as needed
tasks.description: Right-click and unlock unused programs in the launcher, such as Amazon One, to allow for further exploration of Linux features without affecting host OS files.
